seoTitle: How to Use Gumroad Workflows for Email Automation
metaDescription: Learn how to set up automated Gumroad Workflows that trigger follow-up emails after a purchase or free download, without manual sending.
intro: Gumroad Workflows let you automate follow-up emails so buyers hear from you without you sending each message manually. This guide covers setting a trigger, structuring your message timing, and writing the emails that make up your automated sequence.

steps.heading: Open the workflows panel
steps.body: From the emails section of your dashboard, find the workflows area where automated sequences are built.

steps.heading: Create a new workflow
steps.body: Start a fresh automation and give it a name that reflects its purpose, such as a welcome sequence.

steps.heading: Set your trigger
steps.body: Choose what starts the sequence, such as a new sale or a free product download, and link it to the relevant product.

steps.heading: Configure timing and messages
steps.body: Decide how long to wait before each email sends, then write the content for each step in the sequence.

steps.heading: Publish and monitor
steps.body: Activate the workflow and check its performance over time to see how recipients are engaging.

faq.question: What can trigger a Gumroad workflow?
faq.answer: Workflows can be triggered by events like a new purchase or someone downloading a free product.

faq.question: Can I send more than one email in a workflow?
faq.answer: Yes, you can chain multiple emails together with different delays to build a full sequence.

faq.question: Can I personalize the emails in a workflow?
faq.answer: Yes, Gumroad workflows support personalization tags so messages can include details like the buyer's name.

faq.question: Do workflows replace one-off broadcasts?
faq.answer: No, workflows run automatically based on triggers, while broadcasts are sent manually whenever you choose.
